programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: Academic overachievers Amy and Molly thought keeping their noses to the grindstone gave them a leg up on their high school peers. But on the eve of graduation, the best friends suddenly realize that they may have missed out on the special moments of their teenage years. Determined to make up for lost time, the girls decide to cram four years of not-to-be missed fun into one night -- a chaotic adventure that no amount of book smarts could prepare them for.

programme.title: 27 Dresses
programme.desc: Perennial bridesmaid Jane always puts the needs of others before her own, making her the go-to gal whenever someone needs help with wedding plans. So when Jane's younger sister Tess snags the man Jane secretly loves, Jane finds herself questioning her role as a wedding junkie for the first time in her life. Meanwhile, a handsome reporter sees Jane's unusual story as his ticket off the bridal beat.

programme.title: Made of Honor
programme.desc: Always shy of commitment, Tom (Patrick Dempsey) lives as a serial dater. Hannah (Michelle Monaghan), his best friend, has wanted to marry and now has found Mr. Right -- just as Tom realizes he really loves Hannah. When she asks him to be in her bridal party, Tom seizes the opportunity to prevent the nuptials and woo her himself.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: Robert De Niro, Katherine Heigl, Diane Keaton, Amanda Seyfried, Topher Grace, Susan Sarandon, and Robin Williams give outstanding performances in this uproarious romantic comedy. When long-divorced parents (De Niro and Keaton) are forced to reunite and play the "happy couple" at their son's wedding, they must confront their past, present, and future—as the celebration threatens to turn into a full-blown fiasco!

programme.desc: Perennial bridesmaid Jane always puts the needs of others before her own, making her the go-to gal whenever someone needs help with wedding plans. So when Jane's younger sister Tess snags the man Jane secretly loves, Jane finds herself questioning her role as a wedding junkie for the first time in her life. Meanwhile, a handsome reporter sees Jane's unusual story as his ticket off the bridal beat.

programme.title: Made of Honor
programme.desc: Always shy of commitment, Tom (Patrick Dempsey) lives as a serial dater. Hannah (Michelle Monaghan), his best friend, has wanted to marry and now has found Mr. Right -- just as Tom realizes he really loves Hannah. When she asks him to be in her bridal party, Tom seizes the opportunity to prevent the nuptials and woo her himself.

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: When mankind perfects time travel, the government establishes the Time Enforcement Commission to thwart criminal attempts to alter the timeline. Police officer Walker (Jean-Claude Van Damme) is recruited by TEC Cmdr. Matuzak (Bruce McGill), but soon finds his investigation of Senator Aaron McComb (Ron Silver) being thwarted by elements within the government. When Walker's wife, Melissa (Mia Sara), is attacked, he must travel across time to rescue her and save the future.

programme.title: Volcano (1997)
programme.desc: Something unspeakably chilling is heating up The City of Angels. Beneath the famed La Brea Tar Pits, a raging volcano pushes to the surface, raining a storm of deadly fire bombs and an endless tide of white-hot lava upon the stunned city. Experience the pulse-pounding thrills as the dream capital of the world erupts into the stuff nightmares are made of.

programme.title: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, highly intelligent robots fill public service positions throughout the world, operating under three rules to keep humans safe. Despite his dark history with robotics, Detective Del Spooner (Will Smith) investigates the alleged suicide of U.S. Robotics founder Alfred Lanning (James Cromwell) and believes that a human-like robot (Alan Tudyk) murdered him. With the help of a robot expert (Bridget Moynahan), Spooner discovers a conspiracy that may enslave the human race.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: Mega City One is a vast, violent metropolis where felons rule the streets. The only law lies with cops called "judges," who act as judge, jury and executioner, and Dredd (Karl Urban) is one of the city's most feared. One day, Dredd is partnered with Cassandra (Olivia Thirlby), a rookie with powerful psychic abilities. A report of a terrible crime sends Dredd and Cassandra to a dangerous area controlled by Ma-Ma (Lena Headey), a drug lord who will stop at nothing to protect her empire.

programme.title: Replicant
programme.desc: Detective Jake Riley is on the trail of serial killer Edward "The Torch" Garrotte, who murders mothers and sets them ablaze after they're dead. Nearing retirement, Riley is removed from the case but is soon contacted by a government agency that has created a clone of Garrotte using a secret technology. The replicant (also Van Damme) teams with Riley to help track down the killer, but despite the novel approach, Garrotte will be hard to stop.

programme.title: Timecop

Then Marley learns she has terminal colon cancer. Despite her determination not to be tied down in a serious relationship, Marley finds herself falling in love with her handsome doctor (Gael García Bernal), even as her health slowly deteriorates.

But when a clerical error causes a clash in wedding dates, Liv and Kate discover their inner demons -- with their lifelong friendship as a possible casualty.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding

Now, four days before her 28th birthday, O'Neil announces that he's marrying a gorgeous 20-year-old named Kimberly (Cameron Diaz). Suddenly realizing that she's actually in love with him, Julianne vows to stop the wedding at all costs. However, when she is appointed maid of honor, things get even more complex.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: Based on the beloved young adult novel. A young man (Brenton Thwaites), who lives in a seemingly ideal world, must escape after discovering the deadly truths of his community's secret past.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Einar (Robert Redford), a recovering alcoholic rancher who lives with his loyal pal Mitch (Morgan Freeman), gets an unexpected visit from his daughter-in-law, Jean (Jennifer Lopez), and granddaughter, Griff (Becca Gardner). Einar holds a grudge against Jean because he feels she's responsible for his son's accidental death, but he reluctantly lets her stay at the farm when he learns that she's trapped in a violent relationship. Over time, they grow closer and try to heal their emotional wounds.

programme.title: Kiss the Girls
programme.desc: Successful forensic psychologist Alex Cross (Morgan Freeman) discovers that his niece has gone missing. Once he consults with police Detective Nick Ruskin (Cary Elwes), Cross believes that the disappearance is the work of an insane killer known as "Casanova." Meanwhile, Dr. Kate McTiernan (Ashley Judd) is kidnapped by this criminal and witnesses many other imprisoned women in his lair. After narrowly escaping, McTiernan teams up with Cross to try to apprehend the deranged Casanova.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Vincent Vega (John Travolta) and Jules Winnfield (Samuel L. Jackson) are hitmen with a penchant for philosophical discussions. In this ultra-hip, multi-strand crime movie, their storyline is interwoven with those of their boss, gangster Marsellus Wallace (Ving Rhames) his actress wife, Mia (Uma Thurman) struggling boxer Butch Coolidge (Bruce Willis) master fixer Winston Wolfe (Harvey Keitel) and a nervous pair of armed robbers, "Pumpkin" (Tim Roth) and "Honey Bunny" (Amanda Plummer).

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: For Dan Gallagher (Michael Douglas), life is good. He is on the rise at his New York law firm, is happily married to his wife, Beth (Anne Archer), and has a loving daughter. But, after a casual fling with a sultry book editor named Alex (Glenn Close), everything changes. Jilted by Dan, Alex becomes unstable, her behavior escalating from aggressive pursuit to obsessive stalking. Dan realizes that his main problem is not hiding his affair, but rather saving himself and his family.

programme.title: Mortal Thoughts
programme.desc: Two New Jersey hairdressers try to cover up a murder without destroying their friendship.

programme.desc: Nick is a struggling dentist in Canada. A new neighbor moves in, and he discovers that it is Jimmy Teduski.

When she encounters charming publisher Shepherd Henderson (James Stewart), she decides to make him hers by casting a love spell. Gillian takes added pleasure in doing so because Henderson is engaged to her old college rival (Janice Rule). However, Gillian finds herself actually falling for Shepherd, which poses a problem: She will lose her powers if she falls in love.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone

Led by British Major Franklin (Anthony Quayle), the team includes American Mallory (Gregory Peck), Greek resistance fighter Stavros (Anthony Quinn) and reluctant explosives expert Miller. Facing impossible odds, the men battle stormy seas and daunting cliffs. When Franklin is injured, Mallory takes command, and personal enmities spill over.

programme.title: From Here to Eternity

Hard-hearted Capt. Holmes (Philip Ober) subjects Prew to a grueling series of punishments while, unknown to Holmes, the gruff but fair Sgt. Warden (Burt Lancaster) engages in a clandestine affair with the captain's mistreated wife (Deborah Kerr).

Though spotted by goatherds, Luttrell and his team decide not to kill them. But one of the Afghans alerts a group of Taliban fighters to the invaders, and a terrible battle ensues, in which the SEALs find themselves hopelessly outnumbered and outgunned.

programme.desc: Brandon's world is turned upside down when he receives a phone call from Maurice, revealing himself to be his long-lost brother.

programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a friend from Lucas' past. But he has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brothers mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man.

programme.title: The Far Country
programme.desc: At the height of the Yukon Gold Rush, cowboy Jeff Webster (James Stewart) and his partner, Ben Tatum (Walter Brennan), want in on the action, and decide to drive their cattle from Wyoming to Yukon. Along their journey, the two run afoul of crooked lawman Gannon (John McIntire), who vows revenge when they escape him. After traveling through all manner of terrain, Webster and Tatum finally arrive at their destination. But Gannon has business in the town, and he intends to make good on his promise.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: American Civil War film about a wealthy widower who has remained steadfast in his opposition to the war on moral grounds. However, he is forced to become involved in the conflict when his son-in-law is called upon to serve in the Confederate forces, his youngest son is captured by the Union army, and another son and his pregnant daughter-in-law are killed by looters.

programme.title: The Searchers
programme.desc: In this revered Western, Ethan Edwards (John Wayne) returns home to Texas after the Civil War. When members of his brother's family are killed or abducted by Comanches, he vows to track down his surviving relatives and bring them home. Eventually, Edwards gets word that his niece Debbie (Natalie Wood) is alive, and, along with her adopted brother, Martin Pawley (Jeffrey Hunter), he embarks on a dangerous mission to find her, journeying deep into Comanche territory.

programme.title: The Train Robbers
programme.desc: A proud widow hires a Civil War veteran to help recover the gold her late husband stole from Wells Fargo.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: After being robbed of a large sum of money, an embittered prospector denies his wife a purple silk dress that has become a symbol of beauty in her life.

programme.desc: The story of Mary Helen Crosby, who -- in the company of Gen. John Bidwell, custodian of the papers admitting California to the Union -- concealed the papers in her umbrella to ensure their safe arrival at San Francisco.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two men running from a posse find a rich silver deposit, which means they must find a way to stake their claim without going to jail.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A young wife finds it difficult to adjust to life on the prairie after she and her Mormon husband move away from Salt Lake City, and she takes drastic measures to find relief.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.14

programme.title: The Swing Clinic
programme.desc: The Swing Clinic - The Swing Clinic: In this episode of The Swing Clinic, PGA professional Jimmy Hanlin and golf influencer Claire Hogle visit Springfield Country Club in Delaware County, Pennsylvania, to offer golf tips in a fun, approachable way. The show focuses on practical, easy-to-understand advice to help viewers improve their game, covering key fundamentals like iron play, proper driver setup, chipping technique, and putting. Jimmy and Claire demonstrate drills and share memorable cues, like “move the right knee first” or “chest to the target” to build muscle memory and fix common mistakes

programme.title: The Swing Clinic
programme.desc: The Swing Clinic - The Swing Clinic: In this episode of The Swing Clinic from Springfield Country Club in Pennsylvania, Jimmy Hanlin and his co-host share practical golf instruction mixed with local flavor. They cover fundamentals like keeping your head steady, plus creative drills using everyday items to improve swing mechanics. The hosts also show how to shape shots, create lag for consistency, and pass along wisdom from legends like Tom Watson. Between lessons, the episode spotlights the beauty of Springfield, the upcoming PGA Championship at nearby Aronimink, and local attractions, blending useful golf tips with a taste of the area's history and hospitality.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Gila Monster: New Mexico Bull Elk
programme.desc: After four years of waiting, Steven Rinella draws a coveted, limited-entry public land bull elk tag for New Mexico's Gila National Forest. Steve heads into the backcountry on a solo backpack hunt where his biggest challenge is the vast expanse of hills covered in thick timber. This demanding hunt requires lots of glassing and even more hiking. Here, even just one missed opportunity could result in an empty freezer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Hearts of Darkness: Ticker Cooking Special
programme.desc: While its considered a long-standing hunting tradition to eat the heart of your first kill, the heart.

In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater

programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Ski A&E: The High Price of Pain
programme.desc: In an exciting, high-octane past-time, accidents will happen, so make sure you take out insurance.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Welcome to Season 2 of Turkey Ninja presented by WoodHaven! It's opening day of youth season in Alabama and Mike and Jacob are ready to work on some longbeards! Right off the roost turkeys are in sight and put on quite a show for Jacob who is trying to punch a tag on his 39th "Shrutter"!

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "The Blacktail of Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Establishing themselves just after the last Ice Age, the blacktail of Vancouver Island offers an important genetic population isolated from the mainland. To explore the local relationship with the species, its harvesting, conservation and history, Dan Cabela travels to the island.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Turkey Posse - "Wisconsin Turkey Hunting: Two Longbeards at Flydown
programme.desc: Few moments in turkey hunting are better than watching a longbeard pitch down at first light. In this episode of Turkey POSSE, the crew sets up on roosted birds in Wisconsin and the action unfolds fast. At flydown, two fired-up gobblers commit to the setup, giving us an unforgettable sunrise in the spring turkey woods. Roosted birds don't always cooperate — but when they do, it's pure magic. If you love spring turkey hunting, hard gobbling longbeards, and classic flydown action, this is the kind of hunt that keeps us coming back every season.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: After a long winter, Pete Osterman is eager to knock down his Minnesota gobbler with Josh Dahlke for their annual opening-week tradition. But like many turkey hunts, the POSSE gets the runaround at fly-down and end up grinding all day for an opportunity.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: This passion project of Willi's came about after filming the Opening of Pure Hunting's TV series for a couple of years. There was quite a bit of filming showcasing him working out and he decided to utilize the footage for a larger project. “My Why” is a short film of his why for working out and showcasing a few hunts where his physical fitness came into play.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi got an invitation on a late season whitetail hunt in Oklahoma. He joins Tom Petry for a rifle hunt on a property he has no history with, but it did have some good deer and lots of wild horses.

programme.title: Bearded Buck
programme.sub-title: The Bearded Buck - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Join Gavin as he heads afield in Pennsylvania to chase gobblers. He finds himself in the middle of a perfect off the roost hunt that was captured beautifully.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Hunting Wisconsin gobblers into the final weeks of May comes with its challenges. Birds have faced a full season of hunting pressure, and they're always a moment away from flipping the switch into summer patterns. But those last few eager longbeards make it worth the grind. In this episode of the Turkey POSSE, Grant Hudgens tags his first ever out-of-state strutter and becomes a card-carrying member of the Turkey POSSE.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: The Raven Project - "Rifle Camp At The Dirty Bird
programme.desc: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: The Raven Project - "Tagged Out At The Dirty Bird
programme.desc: It's still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Colton Jordan is on a mission to complete a single season grand slam with his big brother Tyler. The two head to South Florida for the opening weekend of Turkey Season in hopes of harvesting one of these beautiful black winged swamp birds.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation
programme.desc: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester's best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We'll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.sub-title: Deer and Deer Hunting - "Stalking the Sandhills
programme.desc: Knowing when to spot and stalk is crucial for any hunter. In this episode of DDH-TV, Mark Kayser breaks down three key factors for success, while Dan Schmidt puts them into action as he stalks a buck in Nebraska's Sandhills.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "South American Upland Slam - La Pampa
programme.desc: On day three of Mark Peterson's South America Upland Slam adventure, the guys are snowed in while waiting to head to La Pampa, where the weather promised to be much better. After a tense wait for the go-ahead to fly out, they finally touched down in La Pampa and headed straight to the field. There, the grasslands and scattered thickets provide the perfect habitat for Bushed Tinamou, known for their elusive nature and penchant for hiding among dense underbrush. Day four is dedicated to hunting these Tinamou, with Mark eager to track them in their natural habitat. On day five, their focus shifts to Pigeons, where they set up decoys along the edge of a cut cornfield. The anticipation of drawing in flocks makes for an incredible hunt and Mark can't wait to see what the day will bring.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: With over 20 years of service, retiring as a Senior Chief Machinery Technician, Steven served abord multiple Coast Guard cutters, led critical missions, protected our nation's leaders, and earned the Coast Guard Achievement Medal for his outstanding service. Beyond the uniform, Steven has has spent decades giving back - coaching youth sports, mentoring young athletes, and living the values of service, leadership, and integrity. Steven's dedication didn't end with retirement - and neither does our gratitude. We were honored to have Steven at Thumbtack Ranch and are even more grateful for his service.

programme.title: Storytellers

programme.title: Epic Funny Video Countdown
programme.desc: We're counting down the 100 funniest videos of all time. Hope you're ready, because each one is EPIC!

programme.title: Tom Foss
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: It's hard being funny 24/7, but Josh Sneed does it, and that's why he became a stand-up comedian, to give his humor a “second chance at life.” In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Josh gives tips for people-watching (make sure your flash is off when you're taking pictures), and paints hilarious word caricatures of the people he's seen. Anyone who's been to Long John Silver's or Taco Bell (or the 2-in-1 version), will appreciate Josh's humor.

programme.title: Jenna Kim Jones
programme.desc: Jenna Kim Jones is a comedian known for her strong personality and little to no upper body strength. She recently came to grips with the fact that she will never be able to do a pull up and earn her 4th grade Presidential Fitness Award though she plans to exploit this limitation into a book or reality television deal. Jenna was born in Seoul, Korea and lived there for approximately 8 years until she moved to Provo, Utah. At 18, Jenna left Provo to attend New York University where she majored in Producing and Writing for Television. During her time at NYU, she interned at Follow Productions, The Martha Show, The Late Show with David Letterman, The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and CBS Primetime Casting. After graduating from NYU, Jenna began performing stand up comedy while she worked at The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. After working at The Daily Show for almost 4 years, Jenna met her husband Allan Moss and the two were married in July of 2012 at which point Jenna left New York City to move to Los Angeles, California to pursue comedy (and sunshine). When she isn't working on her Netflix addiction, Jenna spends her days and nights writing and telling jokes all over the country. Once upon a time, Huffington Post named Jenna One of 18 Funny Women You Should Be Following On Twitter. For those of you who don't know, that is a compliment. However, it's when she gets her name on a Buzzfeed list that she'll know she's really made it. Jenna has appeared on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and performed stand up alongside some of the best comedians including Jim Gaffigan, John Oliver, Wyatt Cenac and Aasif Mandvi. Her podcast, #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones, is one of the Top 200 Comedy Podcasts on iTunes. Her first stand up comedy special also #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones is available for sale at www.jennakimjones.com/shop. JKJ released a 2nd Comedy Special, “Jenna Kim Jones Live In Hollywood” as part of the “Everyone Laughs” series on Sirius XM Laugh USA in September of 2016. Her comedy plays regularly on both Sirius XM channels Laugh USA and Jeff and Larry's Comedy Roundup. Jenna is also known for her work as the on camera host/narrator of the feature length documentary, “Meet The Mormons” which was released in theaters nationwide on October 10, 2014 and is, as of now, the 31st most successful documentary of all time.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: John Branyan's comedy is smart and sarcastic in perfect proportions. This special features his perspective on why God made everyone stupid and his unparalleled Shakespearean take on The Three Little Pigs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Michael Palascak's dry humor shines with riffs on interviewing for a pyramid scheme, living with his parents after college, and how life is way better now than in 1984.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBS's Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamy's Who's Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience don't act funny, be funny... don't worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamy's Who's Got Jokes on TVONE. BET'S One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayan's TBS's Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamy's Who Got Joke's Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 – Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Tom Foss
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: It's hard being funny 24/7, but Josh Sneed does it, and that's why he became a stand-up comedian, to give his humor a “second chance at life.” In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Josh gives tips for people-watching (make sure your flash is off when you're taking pictures), and paints hilarious word caricatures of the people he's seen. Anyone who's been to Long John Silver's or Taco Bell (or the 2-in-1 version), will appreciate Josh's humor.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.sub-title: Come on down!" "The Price Is Right
programme.desc: - hosted by Bob Barker until 2007 and Drew Carey thereafter -- features a wide variety of games and contests with the same basic challenge: Guess the prices of everyday (or not-quite-everyday) retail items. Four contestants, all of whom are seated in one of the wildest audiences in daytime game-show history, are called to the stage to play a preliminary pricing round. That winner joins the host on stage for one of more than 70 different pricing games. After three such games, the contestants spin a big wheel -- hoping to get as close to $1 as possible -- in the "Showcase Showdown." The two highest winners of that round advance to the final, where prizes could be cars or roomsful of furniture. A trio of models presents the prizes.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of the episode.

Soon Dracula begins to wreak havoc, sucking the blood of young women and turning them into vampires. When he sets his sights on Mina (Helen Chandler), the daughter of a prominent doctor, vampire-hunter Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan) is enlisted to put a stop to the count's never-ending bloodlust.

However, when Mina dies and her father, Prof. Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier), attributes her death to a vampire, evidence indicates that Count Dracula is the monster, and Lucy is his next target.

programme.title: Dracula

Now under Dracula's spell, Renfield helps his master travel to London, where the vampire takes another victim (Carmen Guerrero). Dracula also has eyes on the lovely Eva (Lupita Tovar), but her fiancé, Juan Harker (Barry Norton), and a wise professor named Van Helsing (Eduardo Arozamena) seek to stop him.

programme.title: Dracula's Daughter

When attempts to free herself of the disease fail, she turns to psychiatrist Dr. Garth (Otto Kruger) for assistance, but soon finds herself struggling with the desire to make him one of the undead as well.

programme.desc: Coyote faces manys fear... Getting a tatoo!Caring for a miniature pony is no small job! Coyote visits a farm and learns the basics of grooming, feeding, and why these tiny horses need special care.

programme.title: Camera Trap Catches Rare Animal!

programme.title: Top 13 Most Painful Insect Stings Coyote Peterson Has Ever Taken!
programme.desc: Coyote ranks the top 13 most painful insect stings he's ever taken. From bullet ants to wasps, it's a countdown filled with pain and science. From sand to sea, Coyote builds a mini mudflat aquarium packed with bizarre marine creatures. It's a deep dive into ocean ecology.

programme.title: SPIDER-MURDERING WASPS
programme.sub-title: 10 Things You Probably Need to Know!

programme.title: PREHISTORIC TREASURE FOUND?!

programme.title: $10,000 Animal Challenge – Who Will Win?!

Coyote takes on the shell-filled challenge with nets, patience, and muddy hands to see how many species he can spot.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Attack Dogs!
programme.desc: In a dramatic training exercise, Coyote allows himself to be bitten by three trained attack dogs. Protective gear is tested to the limit.Ever wanted to catch fireflies and make a glow lantern? Coyote shows how to safely observe these luminous bugs and builds a bug-powered lantern.

programme.title: Bitten by the Biggest Ant in the World!

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Barbie & Friends

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.desc: Each month there is a big market at the Speedor races. Laval and Eris go there, but Cragger has hired the Ravens to steal Laval's precious Speedor. And suddenly the prize of the races, the Golden CHI, has also disappeared.

programme.title: The Power and the Peril!

programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Fallen Wishes
programme.desc: Sora, Nya and Riyu are summoned to New Djinjago to help a friend, and the mystery bounty hunter receives a new mission.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Hybrid Horror!

programme.title: Lunia

programme.title: Moving on up!
programme.desc: The dream chasers hunt for Lunia's hourglass, which they believe will help them defeat the evil Dreamsmasher.

programme.title: Brainstorm
programme.desc: After locating Lunia's hourglass, the team heads to the dream world's sun, which holds more secrets than the object they're searching for!

programme.title: Olly's Quest For Fame
programme.desc: Paisley turns to Zac for help with something completely unrelated: dancing. She hopes that learning a new skill will help her feel more grounded and in control.

programme.title: Can Of Worms

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes Guardians of the Galaxy: The Thanos Threat
programme.desc: The Guardians of the Galaxy protect the Build Stone. When Thanos, Ronan, Nebula and the Ravagers seek to possess the Build Stone, the fate of the universe depends on the Guardians of the Galaxy to protect it.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Odell Beckham Jr. Edition
programme.desc: Odell Beckham + Dude Perfect = FUN

programme.title: Counting to 50 By 10s with Abby & Elmo
programme.desc: 50 is a really big number! Follow along with Elmo, Abby, and some special celebrity friends to learn to count to 50 by 10s!

programme.title: Jobs in the Hive
programme.desc: Buzzie tells Renata about different jobs in the hive. She tells what bees are engaged in scouting flowers, what bees collect flower pollen, and also who bee-cleaners and bee-guards are. And of course Buzzie tells about the most important major bee – t...

programme.title: Amazing Sam Adventure
programme.desc: Today is a super weird day because Sam is about to embark on a fantastic adventure he could never expect. Are you ready to join Sam and help him return to the present day? Then, let's get started!

programme.title: The Lava Dance Adventure
programme.desc: THE FLOOR IS LAVA! It's time to run, jump, paddle, and DANCE with Ms. Gaby in this fun and fiery Lava Dance adventure! This interactive movement song is perfect for preschoolers and young kids who love excitement, learning, and a good giggle!

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Draw along with Lemur and friends in the ZooMoo Art Studio! Seal!

programme.title: What's The Word? My Name is and I Love You!
programme.desc: Join Madame Gaby at the caf for more fabulous French fun! It's time to head back to Paris, France and learn some of the most important French you will need to know... How to tell someone your name and that you love them! Will you join us? You will?!

programme.title: Learn Common Household Words with Woodzeez and Bluey for Kids!
programme.desc: Join the fun as we learn common words with Woodzeez and Bluey in this educational video for kids and toddlers! The Tailfeathers family is moving to a new toy house, and we'll help them decorate it after flying there in the Woodzeez toy airplane. Next,...

programme.title: Royal Heist
programme.desc: King Pig rescues a mistreated egg. After all, these things aren't exactly a dime-a-dozen! Are they?

programme.title: Teamwork
programme.desc: Kimberly and Trini gather enough signatures to close down a nearby polluting dumpsite. Unaware that the dumpsite is controlled by Rita, the girls go there and are attacked by Putties.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: THE WAWIES
programme.desc: Wawaland is a tiny world within planet Earth. So small and light that it gets carried away by the wind. Right now, it could be flying over Tokyo, Paris, or the Atlantic Ocean, completely unseen by humans. In this magical place live The Wawies—chubby and curious beings who are always asking questions and trying to make sense of the world around them and ours. Through Sha's far-away glasses, the Wawies can observe how humans behave on Earth and apply what they learn in their own world, sparking endless adventures that teach them, entertain them, help them explore their surroundings, and listen to themselves. They always stick together and never leave anyone behind. For example, this season, you might find them competing in their own version of Wawachef,” escaping from some not-so-friendly monkeys, deciding to ban rules in their world forever, trying to calm down some feisty ants, training their patience to care for a garden, or figuring out which costume party is more fun: Halloween or Carnival. With each adventure, Sha, Opo, Aca, Bow, and Tok strive to understand, grow, and have fun. And along the way, they'll unintentionally create their own set of rules to live in a place where respect and harmony with their surroundings are key. With its playful and cheerful tone, Wawaland seeks to show children a different way of seeing things—helping them appreciate the world around them and, most importantly, themselves.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Tales of Tatonka
programme.desc: Share great laughs and thrilling adventures with Wanji, Nunpa, Yamni and Topa, four daring wolf-cubs. Our four heroes and their friends learn to grow together as a family and discover the world around them.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child's life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: These are all the fun Nursery Rhymes like The Animal Fair, One Two Buckle my Shoe for your babies!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: 3 Little Kittens, Roadtrip Song, 5 Cute Fruits and more fun songs to be danced to in this episode

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 4
programme.desc: Join Annie, Ben and Mango on a South African jungle safari, where they try to reunite two rhino calves with their mother. Watch them drive through a river, get chased by an angry adult rhino and, in Mango's case, get pulled into a mud bath!

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 5
programme.desc: Is it a bird? Is it a plane? It's... a UFO! Annie, Ben and Mango encounter an alien in the Nevada desert, who offers to take them to the moon! What gravity-defying adventures await them there? Watch this alien-tastic episode to find out

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Every kids loves Head Shoulders Knees and Toes, Old MacDonlad had a Farm & all the nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Here's a collection of gentle melodies featuring Little Boy Blue, Let's go to sleep, and many more.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Let the babies drift off into a magical slumber with Hush Little Baby, Hey Diddle Diddle and more!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Soft, comforting lullabies to make bedtime serene and cozy for children.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Blippi's Dino Digs and Elmo Birthday Surprises
programme.desc: Blippi combines two amazing adventures as he digs up dinosaur fossils and enjoys a festive birthday celebration with Meeka, Abby and Elmo.

programme.title: The Littlest Berrykin
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, “The Littlest Berrykin,” into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics. But before leaving, they must choose which of their three princesses (played by Lemon, Raspberry and Strawberry in royal gowns) will rule the kingdom.

programme.title: The Berry Big Relay Race
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the “retrieve” part of the activity—as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search. Orange finds Strawberry, Plum and Raspberry in Lemon's salon, getting their hair and nails done, but something starts going terribly wrong with the appliances.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Sid the Weatherman
programme.desc: Sid and friends investigate weather and learn that weathermen don't control the weather, but they do have to know all about rain, sun, wind, and hot and cold temperatures!

programme.title: Special Mom Day Meal
programme.desc: When Sid smells the French toast and his stomach growls, he wonders if his stomach is trying to talk to him. When Sid and his friends investigate at school, they discover that the stomach makes noise when it's getting ready for digestion.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Holiday Special 2022
programme.desc: Blippi and Meekah follow a holiday treasure map and do some fun winter activities.

programme.title: The Berry Best Treasure
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control—life in Berry Bitty City is impossible! Strawberry rallies their spirits by suggesting a fun way for them to spend the day out of town: a treasure hunt! She describes a game where the girls divide into two teams, and each team creates fun written clues for the other that lead to funny objects the girls must collect.

programme.title: The Berry Scary Fun Adventure
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest! Rallied by a sense of competition and adventure, the girls divide into three groups and set up tents—each convinced they will be the bravest group. They each come up with diverting activities to distract themselves.

programme.title: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: Blue Angel slowly begins whittling away Playmaker's Life Points using her Trickstar deck. Yusaku manages to fight back and Aoi is forced to use the mysterious card that the Knights of Hanoi gave her.

programme.title: A Storm is Coming
programme.desc: Aoi is left in a coma after he duel with Yusaku. A grieving Akira lures Playmaker into a trap to get the program to heal her. That's when Revolver, Hanoi's leader appears, and challenges Yusaku to a duel with Aoi's fate on the line.

programme.title: Water Babies
programme.desc: Go on a Pop Safari with Ninja Gorilla! Can you guess what balloon sculpture he's making?

programme.title: Kooki's Crafty Show
programme.desc: It's peek-a-boo time with Kooki, as she makes a puppy card and she whips up a rocket ship you can eat.

programme.title: Lunar New Year Specials
programme.desc: Kooki makes a papercup dragon and a rattle drum to celebrate Chinese New Year.

programme.title: Black and White
programme.desc: Go on a Pop Safari with Ninja Gorilla! Can you guess what balloon sculpture he's making?

programme.title: Kooki's Crafty Show
programme.desc: All aboard a scrumptious train Kooki creates and her ladybug costume is a must to make.

programme.title: Daring Divers
programme.desc: Go on a Pop Safari with Ninja Gorilla! Can you guess what balloon sculpture he's making?

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: The ZooMoo team learn about predators.

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: The ZooMoo team learn about ants.

programme.title: Music & Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Jelly Jamm celebrates music, fun and friendship.

programme.title: Kooki's Crafty Show
programme.desc: Kooki makes some snails and caterpillars you can eat! Then rows away in her giant origami boat.

programme.title: Tricky Tongues
programme.desc: Go on a Pop Safari with Ninja Gorilla! Can you guess what balloon sculpture he's making?

programme.title: Kooki's Crafty Show
programme.desc: No need to be scared of the dark, as Kooki show us how to make a fox jar lantern.

programme.title: Going for a Ride
programme.desc: Go on a Pop Safari with Ninja Gorilla! Can you guess what balloon sculpture he's making?

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Talking Tom steals the show and reveals his style credentials at Talking Angela's big fashion even

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: There's no such thing as bad publicity when it comes to Talking Angela's singing career.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Austrian Adventure: The Super Ks take a trip to Austria with Mr. Arnold to solve the mystery of the missing mini horse.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Emerson: A new exchange student from England teaches the Super Ks that appreciating each other's differences can save the day.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Mush Rumors / The Ugly Mermaid: When a real world family drives into the Mushroom Kingdom, the Mushroom People and the Koopas mistake them for aliens. / While wearing a Frog Suit, Mario almost drowns, but he is saved by Holly Mackerel, a mermaid princess. Holly falls in love with Mario and tries to marry him.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - True Colors / Recycled Koopa: Kooky and Cheatsy use a special paint to turn all the Mushroom People either red or blue and trick the two colors into hating each other. / When the Koopalings can't get away with dumping their trash in the Mushroom Kingdom, they warp it all to Brooklyn.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Thankstaking For The Memories: Over the annual "Thankstaking" holiday, Spyro and Elf accidentally get locked inside the Grand Library's relics room while everyone is gone for the long weekend.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Elementary, My Dear Eruptor: Eruptor discovers he's a genius and is able to deduce evil deeds (and the evil-doers behind them) a la Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Pac-Pong Fever: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Indiana Pac and the Temple of Slime: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Chase the Mysterious Bakugan! / Drago in the Crosshairs!: There are reports all over Los Volmos of a rogue Bakugan rampaging at night and destroying people's property. / A strange golden Bakugan has been appearing at practise fields across Los Volmos in search of Dragonoid of Pyrule.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Magnus of the Wild / Gate Card, Set!: Magnus is back with a newly found power, he's finally ready to take on Dan Kouzo in an ultimate showdown. / With help from some new Kazami tech, Wynton puts the finishing touches on his new mobile gate.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Roadsterball / Blond is Back!: Klaus' longtime nemesis, Niccolo Tessio, challenges the Paq to a game of Roadsterball. Team leader Klaus only chooses the fastest and strongest of the Paq to help, but it doesn't go the way he planned. Klaus must figure out a way to utilize all of the strengths of the Paq members or they'll loose the game. / Shaq has a big surprise for Fleming. He's invited the actor who played James Blond, Ian Connery, to come visit. Ian always wished they could have gone on a real mission together and Fleming feels the same way.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines-the Pyritor. Trixie studies the legend to help them locate the creature's home and put a stop to its reign of terror, but first they must confront the true nature of the beast, and its assistant!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious "Giver," who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East. But when a group of thieves make off with the Giver's precious cargo of slugs, our heroes must ride to the rescue-and discover the secret of who the Giver really is.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns. The Shane Gang search for a way to defeat the new creations, but when the Emperor places a bounty on Junjie's head, they also have to deal with the Dai-Fu and hordes of the Emperor's Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs-in Eli's absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos! It's up to Eli to restore the balance, but the Shadow Clan aren't as friendly as they once were...and that's saying something. Help comes from an unexpected source-Tad and his slug Pieper, who just arrived from the Surface!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Let's Move!
programme.desc: ducktv's let's move! episodes are all about sports, physical exercises and outdoor adventures. This section promotes movement and motor skills, develops basic coordination and a sense of rhythm through exercising.

programme.title: ducktv

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Winx Club

The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Space Yoghurt
programme.desc: Migol, Popodom and Drod bump into unusual problems in space that they manage to solve in equally unusual ways, but at least everything ends well when you can laugh together. Follow the space creatures on their fun and wacky adventures!

programme.title: Invent'Tom
programme.desc: Meet Tom, Car City's very own inventor! In his high-tech lab, he creates the wackiest inventions to solve his friend's problems.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Pincode - A Hurricane for Dare: Carlin says he can predict earthquakes, but Dokko doesn't believe him until one happens! Even then Dokko sets out to prove that it was only a coincidence, and that earthquakes cannot be predicted. In this episode, kids learn about the causes of earthquakes, volcanoes, and wind storms.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Pincode - A Trace on the Snow: Pin misses his Bi-Bi and wants to find a way to see and communicate with him across great distances. He decides he wants a moving picture so he can see Bi-Bi in action! In this episode, kids learn about movies and video and how they are processed and made. Featuring scientist Vladimir Kozmich Zvorikin.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Beach Rescue: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks: Rodeo and Booster's friends dress up for Halloween, but Zitron gets in the way of the fun. Robo to the rescue.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Join the friendly vehicles of Tiny Town as they play games, go on adventures and solve problems together.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.sub-title: Aurelio y Ambar, tal para cual

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Quezada mantiene su mentira con alfileres, exige la complicidad de El Cabo y el silencio a la guerrilla para engañar a Casillas. Navarro felicita a Corina, pero aún desconfía de su lealtad.

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.sub-title: Trans boxeadora asesina Viviendo en camión de grooming

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
